naturalLanguageQuery: show me secure development controls along with related FAQs
generatedSQL:
SELECT c."short", c."long", f."question", f."answer" 
FROM "allTrustControls" c 
JOIN "allTrustFaqs" f ON c."category" = f."category" 
WHERE c."category" ILIKE 'Secure Development';
expectedSQL: SELECT c."short", c."long", f."question", f."answer" FROM "allTrustControls" c LEFT JOIN "allTrustFaqs" f ON c."category" = f."category" WHERE c."category" = 'Secure Development';
explanation: Results: Found 5 rows (meets minimum >=5). SQL Structure: Correct tables and conditions. Intent: Partially addresses the question. Overall score: 4/5
